company.description: Yandex is a technology company that builds intelligent products and services powered by machine learning. Our goal is to help consumers and businesses better navigate the online and offline world. Since 1997, we have delivered world-class, locally relevant search and information services. Additionally, we have developed market-leading on-demand transportation services, navigation products, and other mobile applications for millions of consumers across the globe. Yandex, which has 34 offices worldwide, has been listed on the NASDAQ since 2011.
company.name: Yandex

company.description: Freelance Graphic Design studio specializing in small business and startup Print, Web and Identity projects. Owned and operated by Lead Designer, Alec Chase. AlecChase Design is located in Lafayette, IN. Although small businesses and startups are the main clientele, those who come to AlecChase Design range from 2 man operations to multi-million dollar companies. No job is too small or too big.

company.description: Control Automation LLC designs, supplies, programs and supports a wide variety of industrial automation equipment, robotics and control systems that enhance and streamline your manufacturing process. Our group has been providing innovative automation solutions for 20+ years with a full commitment to superior customer satisfaction. Based in Waukesha Wisconsin our team of automation engineers can work with your team to develop a solution to your automation needs whether it be retrofitting an old system or designing a completely new operation give us a call today and let us help improve your current processes.
company.name: Control Automation

company.description: DAM PROJECTS is a curatorial collective founded in 2014 by Daniella Rose King, Amanprit Sandhu and Morgan Quaintance. Inclusive and anti-elitist, the collective use temporary exhibitions, documentary films and events to support emerging, underexposed and unorthodox artists and art scenes, as well as socio-cultural and political developments, discourses and debates.
company.name: DAM Projects
